claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A real anchor for navigation with current, external, download, and standalone target behavior.
semantics: href is required and disabled-link semantics are absent from the public type.
Every resolved target=_blank link receives explicit noopener and noreferrer privacy hardening while preserving consumer rel tokens.
Current state has text weight and decoration in addition to color.
externalContext contributes visible announced context only when external is true and disappears when false.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, state, and focus.
preferences.reducedMotion: Feedback remains understandable when transitions and rotation are removed.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties and the documented spatial keyboard model follow direction.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Wrap, reflow, or expose native scrolling without clipping controls or focus indicators.
